title: PAIK Project
description: The entry point document for a PAIK-described project. See SPEC.md section 5.

description.description: One-paragraph summary of what the project does

systems.description: Relative links to this project's system documents

team_ref.description: Relative link to team.md, or to the teams/ directory/index for multi-team projects

components_ref.description: Relative link to component.md, or to the components/ directory/index for multi-component projects

environments_ref.description: Relative link to the environments/ directory or index

configuration_ref.description: Relative link to configuration.md or the configuration/ directory
